title: WESEARY Wireless Gaming Headset for PS5/PS4/PC/Switch/Mac, Dual Mode 2.4GHz & Bluetooth & USB, Headset with Microphone, 50-Hour Battery, EQ Modes, Lossless Audio, RGB Lighting
features: 🏆 【Immersive Dual EQ Modes & High-Fidelity Sound】Master your audio with this versatile wireless gaming headset. Switch between Game Mode for cinematic 3D surround sound that highlights critical in-game details, and Music Mode for rich, lossless audio perfect for your favorite tracks. The powerful 50mm titanium-coated drivers ensure every shot and soundtrack is delivered with stunning clarity and deep bass.

🔄 【Dual-Mode Wireless: Lag-Free 2.4G & Universal Bluetooth】Experience unparalleled freedom with this gaming headset wireless. The 2.4GHz USB dongle provides an ultra-stable, sub-20ms latency connection for competitive gaming on PS5, PS4, and PC. As a versatile bluetooth headset, it effortlessly pairs with Switch, Mac, and mobile devices for on-the-go entertainment.

🎤 【Crystal-Clear Chat with Dual ENC Microphones】Command your team with this advanced wireless headset with microphone. Featuring dual beamforming microphones with exclusive ENC noise-canceling technology, it isolates your voice from background noise. This ensures your strategic callouts are transmitted with precision, making every command heard loud and clear.

🔋 【50-Hour Marathon Battery & Fast USB-C Charging】Game for days on a single charge. This robust pc gaming headset is equipped with a high-capacity 1200mAh battery, offering up to 50 hours of uninterrupted play without LED, or 30-35 hours with vibrant lighting. A quick 2.5-hour USB-C charge powers you up fast, so you're always ready for action.

😌 【All-Day Ergonomic Comfort for Long Sessions】Designed for marathon use, this gaming headset for ps5 features a lightweight, adjustable headband and breathable protein leather ear cushions. The ergonomic design distributes weight evenly, eliminating pressure points and providing lasting comfort, even during the longest gaming sessions.

🌐 【Extensive Multi-Platform Compatibility】This bluetooth headset with microphone offers broad connectivity. The 2.4GHz dongle works seamlessly with PS5, PS4, and PC, while Bluetooth mode connects to Switch, Mac, and mobile devices. (Please Note: Not compatible with Xbox consoles. Microphone function is not available on Nintendo Switch.)

✨ 【Dynamic RGB Lighting & The Perfect Gift】Elevate your setup with a single click, activating vibrant RGB lighting that enhances your gaming atmosphere. This feature-packed wireless gaming headset is not only a performance powerhouse but also an ideal gift for any gamer, making it a thoughtful present for birthdays, holidays, and special occasions.
